1. Definitions of terms

"Copyright Holder" and "Company" mean TRAFFIC LEGAL LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, INN: 309170527, which holds the exclusive property rights to the TRAFFIC software, including the trademark, source code, design, structure, and other software components. The Company holds all rights to develop, modify, distribute, and commercialize TRAFFIC software in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Uzbekistan.

TRAFFIC Software is an artificial intelligence-based electronic platform that provides access to the legislative framework of the Republic of Uzbekistan. This platform enables each user to quickly search and comprehensively analyze regulatory documents to effectively resolve legal issues. Furthermore, TRAFFIC features functionality that automates the development and analysis of various documents, simplifying work with legal documentation based on the current legislation of the Republic of Uzbekistan.
“Website” is a collection of interconnected web pages accessible on the Internet through a single address http://TRAFFIC.ai, through which the User will interact with TRAFFIC.

"User" means a legal entity or an individual. An individual who has attained full legal capacity has the right to use the TRAFFIC software. A legal entity user independently determines an authorized employee or representative who is authorized to use TRAFFIC.

"Account" means a User account on TRAFFIC, which each User creates independently by entering their details and completing the registration steps. An account may also be created directly by the Company at the User's request.

7. Collection and processing of personal data

7.1. In accordance with the Law of the Republic of Uzbekistan "On Personal Data," the Company collects and processes the User's personal data obtained upon registration or direct entry of personal data by the User into TRAFFIC, namely, the User's last name, first name, patronymic, telephone number, and email address.
